echoParts: from all tribes and peoples and languages
verseText: Behold, a great multitude that no one could number, from every nation, from all tribes and peoples and languages, standing before the throne and before the Lamb...
meaning: This describes God's future forever kingdom, where people from all over the world will worship him together.
